headline: Equifax Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Equifax (NYSE:EFX) reported second-quarter 2026 revenue of $1.7 billion, up 11% on a reported basis and 10% in constant currency, as growth in Workforce Solutions and U.S. mortgage-related revenue helped offset pressure from higher interest rates and weaker conditions in some international markets.

headline: Equifax shares fall after weaker outlook overshadows second-quarter earnings beat (EFX)
summary: Strong quarterly results fail to reassure investorsEquifax Inc. (NYSE:EFX) reported second-quarter results that topped earnings expectations, but the company’s weaker-than-expected guidance for the remainder of 2026 weighed on investor sentiment, sending the shares down 6.

headline: Equifax (NYSE:EFX) Reports Q2 CY2026 In Line With Expectations But Stock Drops 12.1%
summary: Credit reporting giant Equifax (NYSE:EFX) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 10.6% year on year to $1.7 billion. On the other hand, next quarter’s revenue guidance of $1.70 billion was less impressive, coming in 1% below analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.25 per share was 2.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

Its non-GAAP profit of $2.25 per share was 2.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
